2013November 3, 2013

🇰🇷 Gyeongju, Korea

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Gyeongju, Korea, November 3, 2013 -- November 8, 2013

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2013-11-gyeongju-korea

12 Resolutions

865Plenary
Appoint Sheron Koshy as Project Editor for ISO 8000 projects
SC 4 appoints Sheron Koshy as Project Editor for Projects below: * ISO 8000-10 * ISO 8000-20 * ISO 8000-30 * ISO 8000-40 * ISO 8000-100 * ISO 8000-120 * ISO 8000-130 * ISO 8000-140
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
864Plenary
Thank Dr Burton Gischner for his service and dedication
SC 4 expresses its special recognition and thanks to Dr Burton Gischner for his exceptional dedication and outstanding service for many years in the international standardization community. SC 4 es...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
863Plenary
Establish an ad hoc group to improve ISO/PAS 18828
SC 4 establishes an ad hoc group with the task to improve the ISO/PAS 18828 document for submission at the next meeting of SC 4 on 2014-05-04/09.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
862Plenary
Request submission of a PWI for the Unified Architecture Framework (UAF)
SC 4 invites the US member body to submit a Preliminary Work Item (PWI) for consideration. NOTE: The PWI should clearly demonstrate the relationship between SysML, UPDM and UAF.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
861Plenary
Transfer ISO 16739 to ISO/TC 59/SC 13 administration
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 agrees to the request of ISO/TC 59/SC 13 to transfer the Standard ISO 16739 to the administration of SC 13.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
860Plenary
Appoint Dr Martin Hardwick as Co-leader for the SC 4 Implementation Forum
SC 4 appoints Dr Martin Hardwick as Co-leader for the Implementation Forum.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
859Plenary
Reappoint Jochen Haenisch as WG 12 Deputy Convener
SC 4 appoints Jochen Haenisch as Deputy Convener for WG 12 for a further three-year term, with appreciation for his offer to serve in that capacity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
858Plenary
Reappoint Nikolaus Ondracek as WG 2 Convener
SC 4 appoints Nikolaus Ondracek as Convener for WG 2 for a further three-year term, with appreciation for his offer to serve in that capacity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"

Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its appreciation to Prof Soonhung Han for his organization of the Industry Day, and to the speakers for attending and presenting on matters of interest to the SC 4 community.

Acclamation

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
